notes: Smartphone UI declutter — placement & spacing only, all buttons kept (2026-06). PORTRAIT: the ▲▼ elevation arrows moved from beside the joystick to the bottom-RIGHT corner, so the bottom controls now balance left (joystick) / right (arrows) with the tool bar centred above, instead of every control crowding the left half; the 🖥 perf/quality badge's right edge is now aligned flush under the camera row's right end (AR button) instead of sitting 6px short. LANDSCAPE: the bottom-right tool bar (cbar) corner inset unified from 18px to 24px so the joystick, ▲▼ arrows and cbar all share one 24px bottom baseline / margin. No buttons added or removed, no controls shrunk. Builds on v0.0.10 (quality badge in camera row).
